concerns.text: Plan Phase 4 documentation tasks DOC002-DOC004 (error codes, statistical methodology, data provenance) lack explicit implementation tasks in tasks.md. Plan states these are required deliverables but no T-NNN task maps to them.

Plan project structure omits notebooks/ directory entirely, but T095 creates notebooks/statistical_consistency_verification.ipynb required by Constitution Principle VI. Plan does not account for this constitution-mandated artifact.
